title: Flower Patch
description: Allows you to bunch together flowers into a single blockspace similar to pickles
body:
**Flower Patch** allows you to have multiple flowers in the same block space similar to how Sea Pickles and Candles work. Just right-click the flower with the same flower and it'll transform into a Flower Patch that can hold up to 4 flowers. (**You can NOT mix and match)** You can also bonemeal existing flowers to create a flower patch.

Need a server? Get 20% off your first month by using promo code "mrbysco"

For questions feel free to join my Discord. ## Want to support us? ##

  -Mrbysco

  -ShyNieke
